subject: The Arts
note: Achievement objectives from the New Zealand Curriculum. Four disciplines: Dance, Drama, Music, Visual Art. Each shares two strands: Developing Practical Knowledge (DPK) and Developing Ideas (DI), with additional strands Communicating and Interpreting (CI) and Understanding Music in Context (UMC) for Music.

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Explore and use basic elements of music (beat, rhythm, pitch) through singing, playing instruments, and moving

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Explore and use art-making skills (drawing, painting, collage) with a developing understanding of materials and visual elements

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Explore and use elements of music (duration, pitch, dynamics, tone colour) to create, perform, and respond to music

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Use drama techniques (role, improvisation, scripted performance) to explore and express ideas

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Select and use art-making skills, applying knowledge of visual elements (colour, form, line, space, texture) with intention

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Use musical elements and notation to create, perform, and respond to music in a range of styles and contexts

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Develop art works informed by understanding of art history, cultural contexts, and personal voice; use appropriate techniques and materials with increasing control

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Use musical elements and notation with understanding; perform with expression and technical control; compose and arrange music for different purposes

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Develop increasingly sophisticated art works, drawing on personal, cultural, and historical contexts; use purposeful research to inform artistic decision-making

objectives.subject: The Arts
objectives.text: Perform, compose, and respond to music with technical skill and artistic sensitivity; understand music in its cultural and historical context
